description_long: This is a large, modern luxury house with a flat roof and multiple levels, featuring extensive outdoor amenities. The property includes a spacious pool area with a unique, organic-shaped swimming pool, sun loungers, and landscaped greenery. The main building is characterized by clean lines, large windows, and a mix of black and white exterior finishes, giving it a contemporary appearance. There is a circular driveway with a central fountain at the front, and several detached structures, possibly garages or guest houses, are present on the lot. The backyard is designed for recreation and relaxation, with open decks, shaded seating areas, and decorative landscaping. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the property, enhancing privacy and visual appeal.
description: A modern, multi-level luxury house with a flat roof, large windows, a unique pool, and landscaped outdoor spaces. The property features a circular driveway, fountain, and several detached structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway with fountain, and detached structures to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, sun loungers, and extensive backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large pool, open deck, and recreational outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's multi-level structure, pool, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door, steps leading up from a circular driveway, and a prominent fountain centerpiece.
